claim_boundary.report: Current-status feasibility package; robustness, eta optimization, native RSoft modal semantics, and strict cross-solver LP11x convention alignment remain deferred.
claim_boundary.rsoft_bpm: RSoft BeamPROP scalar/semi-vector BPM feasibility addendum for the locked LP11x-like Jones candidate. It validates reviewed package/execution and, when final fields are available, local scalar LP11 projection diagnostics. It is not a fabricated splice, reflection, taper, robustness, or vendor-certified full-vector modal-overlap validation.

figure_inventory.caption: Original LP11x feasibility evidence chain before the RSoft/BPM addendum; use together with the updated BPM section.
Selected p46/SCF86 Jones-polarization architecture and geometry used by the Lumerical/COMSOL feasibility chain.
Solver-stage metrics for retained-FDE, Lumerical EME, and COMSOL before adding the RSoft/BPM row.
LP11x/LP11y-like modal decomposition and cross-solver orientation-convention evidence.
Deferred robustness, eta optimization, strict cross-solver orientation convention, and fabrication/experiment risk matrix.
SMF Jones input summary from the EME-aware passing input. This documents the 4 physical cores x 2 polarization-channel architecture.
Per-channel Jones input amplitude. This supports reproducibility of the phase-amplitude-polarization control vector.
Per-channel Jones input phase. This is part of the reproducible EME-aware input definition.
Per-core polarization state for the locked Jones input. This figure makes clear that the current pass requires polarization degrees of freedom.
Retained-FDE field packet: SMF input-plane amplitude and phase for the selected proof row.
Retained-FDE field packet: SCF entrance plane at z=0. This links the SMF input to the SCF retained-basis propagation model.
Retained-FDE field packet: SCF output plane at the selected length. This is the MMI propagation endpoint before FMF projection/interface evidence.
Retained-FDE reconstructed FMF output amplitude and phase. Camera-like appearance is diagnostic; modal metrics remain the success criterion.
Selected input-channel amplitude, phase, and power summary for the retained-FDE proof packet.
Polarization/Stokes diagnostic maps from the retained-FDE proof packet. This records polarization evidence, not robustness.
Lumerical EME strict LP11x-like output intensity from the real S21 plus real cell-1 remap replay.
COMSOL retained-basis replay of the locked EME Jones input. The output is LP11y-like, i.e. a 90-degree rotated LP11 two-lobe symmetry pass.
COMSOL retained-basis fallback Jones re-optimization. This confirms the same geometry can support strict LP11x-like output in the COMSOL basis.
Geometry and aperture overview for the locked p46/SCF86 LP11x-like Jones candidate. This supports the structure claim only; it is not a modal-success metric.
Normalized 4-core x/y Jones launch amplitudes, phases, and power fractions imported from the EME-aware passing input. This documents the practical control architecture used by the BPM replay.
Coherent x-polarized BeamPROP launch mask amplitude and phase. This records input provenance and distinguishes the replay from an amplitude-only Gaussian launch.
Coherent y-polarized BeamPROP launch mask amplitude and phase. It is paired with the x-polarized subrun and both are combined by input power fraction.
RSoft BeamPROP longitudinal monitor from the executed BPM runs. It supports solver-execution evidence but is not by itself a modal pass.
Parsed final RSoft field panels used for local scalar LP-like projection. The projection is local reviewed evidence, not a vendor-certified native modal-overlap result.
Local scalar LP-group projection power bars from the final BPM field. This figure supports the LP11 two-lobe Gate-I metric claim.
Gate-I metric summary for eta, rho, captured power, and MMI gain against L=0. Robustness and native RSoft modal semantics are deferred.

key_metrics.claim_boundary: RSoft BeamPROP scalar/semi-vector BPM feasibility addendum for the locked LP11x-like Jones candidate. It validates reviewed package/execution and, when final fields are available, local scalar LP11 projection diagnostics. It is not a fabricated splice, reflection, taper, robustness, or vendor-certified full-vector modal-overlap validation.
key_metrics.model_scope: RSoft BeamPROP scalar/semi-vector BPM plus local scalar LP-like projection

report_type: feasibility/current-status final result report refresh with RSoft/BPM addendum

requirement_audit.evidence: base_01_evidence_chain plus refreshed key metrics and artifact index
requirement_audit.requirement: End-to-end evidence chain with solver pass/fail, scope, and source paths.

requirement_audit.evidence: base_02_structure_jones_architecture; RSoft BPM geometry; Jones input figures
requirement_audit.requirement: SMF/SCF/FMF geometry plus 4 core x 2 Jones polarization architecture.

requirement_audit.evidence: retained-FDE field packet figures 10-15 plus RSoft final-field panels
requirement_audit.requirement: SMF input, SCF z=0, SCF z=L, and FMF output amplitude/phase panels.

requirement_audit.evidence: base_04_modal_decomposition and RSoft modal power bars
requirement_audit.requirement: Modal/group power and LP11x/LP11y decomposition figures.

requirement_audit.deferred_reason: Full global length/geometry optimization is deferred by task scope.
requirement_audit.evidence: RSoft gate metric delta_eta_vs_L0 and retained-FDE proof length; no new global length scan in this refresh
retained-FDE SCF z=0/z=L panels and RSoft longitudinal monitor
requirement_audit.requirement: SCF propagation/tangential or longitudinal field evidence.

requirement_audit.deferred_reason: A dedicated convergence figure can be regenerated if the report is upgraded from current-status to robust final validation.
requirement_audit.evidence: SCF160 retained-basis validation exists in source reports; no extra figure regenerated in this refresh
Jones input summary/amplitude/phase/polarization figures and input CSVs
requirement_audit.requirement: Per-SMF and Jones input amplitude, phase, power, and polarization.

requirement_audit.evidence: EME output intensity, COMSOL output figures, RSoft BPM figures and manifests
requirement_audit.requirement: Lumerical FDE/EME, COMSOL, and RSoft/BPM solver evidence.

requirement_audit.deferred_reason: Robustness optimization is intentionally deferred for this feasibility/current-status report.
requirement_audit.requirement: Robustness/tolerance plots for robust-final claims, or explicit deferred-risk record.

Normalized 4-core x/y Jones launch amplitudes, phases, and power fractions imported from the EME-aware passing input. This documents the practical control architecture used by the BPM replay.

geometry.strict_lp11x_orientation_note: LP11y-like 90-degree rotation is recorded separately as symmetry-equivalent LP11 two-lobe evidence.
geometry.units: SI in manifest/CSV; RSoft .ind uses microns
